nodes.name: Webhook: New Restaurant Signup
nodes.notes: Receives signup data from landing page or onboarding form

nodes.name: Generate Google OAuth URL
nodes.notes: Creates OAuth URL with restaurant_id as state parameter

nodes.name: Create Restaurant Record
nodes.notes: Creates initial restaurant record in Airtable

nodes.name: Is Pro Tier?
nodes.notes: Only Pro tier gets brand voice profile

nodes.name: Merge Paths
nodes.notes: Combines Pro (with voice) and Starter (without) paths

parameters.jsCode:
// Generate onboarding confirmation email HTML const restaurant = $('Validate & Prepare Data').item.json; const oauthUrl = $('Generate Google OAuth URL').item.json.oauth_url; const emailHtml = `

🎉 Welcome to Restaurant Review AI!

You're almost ready to automate your review responses

Hi ${restaurant.owner_name},

Thank you for signing up ${restaurant.restaurant_name} for the ${restaurant.tier} Pack! You're taking the first step toward better Google ratings.

✅ Step 1: Account Created

Your account is set up and ready to go!

  • Restaurant: ${restaurant.restaurant_name}
  • Tier: ${restaurant.tier} Pack (${restaurant.tier === 'Pro' ? '$299' : '$149'}/month)
  • Response Limit: ${restaurant.tier === 'Pro' ? '300' : '100'} responses/month
    • ${restaurant.tier === 'Pro' ? '
  • Brand Voice: Custom voice profile created ✨
    • ' : ''}

📍 Step 2: Connect Your Google Business Profile

Click the button below to grant access to your Google Business Profile. This allows us to:

  • ✓ Fetch new reviews automatically
  • ✓ Post responses on your behalf
  • ✓ Monitor your rating trends
🔗 Connect Google Business Profile

Important: You need Manager-level access to your Google Business Profile. If you're the owner, you already have this!

⏰ What Happens Next?

  1. You'll authorize access to your Google Business Profile
  2. We'll fetch your historical reviews and generate sample responses
  3. You'll receive an email digest every Monday with responses to approve
  4. Approved responses will post automatically during business hours
  5. Watch your rating improve! 📈
${restaurant.tier === 'Pro' ? `

✨ Pro Pack Benefits

Your custom brand voice is ready! Here's what makes your responses unique:

  • Personality: ${restaurant.brand_voice?.personality}
  • Tone: ${restaurant.brand_voice?.tone}
  • Emoji Usage: ${restaurant.brand_voice?.emoji_usage}
  • Self-Reference: ${restaurant.brand_voice?.self_reference}
` : ''}

💡 Quick Tips

  • ✓ Responses are generated weekly (every Monday)
  • ✓ You have 72 hours to approve, edit, or reject
  • ✓ Responses post during business hours (9am-8pm)
  • ✓ Check your analytics dashboard for rating trends

Need help? Reply to this email or visit our help center.

Restaurant Review AI | Making 5-star service easy

`; return [{ json: { to: restaurant.owner_email, subject: `Welcome to Restaurant Review AI - ${restaurant.tier} Pack! 🎉`, html: emailHtml, restaurant_name: restaurant.restaurant_name, oauth_url: oauthUrl } }];
